title: persicaria minor subsp. micrantha
intro: Persicaria minor subsp. micrantha, also known as small enchanter's nightshade, is a sub-species of the Persicaria minor plant, a flowering perennial found in wet habitats. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Persicaria minor subsp. micrantha include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Persicaria minor subsp. micrantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
